message:
test(session): add integration tests for differential session workflow

Covers scenarios: no changes, new stuck process, recovery, PID reuse,
worsening, mixed deltas, large-scale (1000 procs), self-diff symmetry,
and full persist→load→diff→report roundtrip.

Closes process_triage-64te

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
